description: Idiocracy is a 2006 American satirical science fiction comedy film directed by Mike Judge and starring Luke Wilson , Maya Rudolph , Dax Shepard , and Terry Crews . The film tells the story of two people who take part in a top-secret military hibernation experiment, only to awaken 500 years later in a dystopian society where advertising , commercialism , and cultural anti-intellectualism have run rampant and that is devoid of intellectual curiosity , social responsibility , and coherent notions of justice and human rights .
subject: Idiocracy
title: Idiocracy
